svg.title: Frontier vs Open
svg.desc: Frontier vs Open: numeric-heat matrix, 8 rows by 4 columns. coding & price · SWE-bench Verified against price per million tokens · current flagships, jun 2026. Columns: , SWE-bench Verified, INPUT, OUTPUT. Full data in hw:payload.

hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Column widths solved from measured headers and cell content with the label column floored at 140px; 40px uniform row pitch (34px past the 16-row soft cap); 33px Inter 800 masthead over an ink hairline rail carrying a 220px signal-gradient scan (6.472s, transform-only). Indicator cells draw 2px geometric marks; the chassis is entirely --dna-* so dark substrates restate it with zero template edits.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: Check and heat hues stay genome-invariant across all eight variants — they communicate state, not skin — trading full per-variant retinting for grayscale-survivable dual coding; hero emphasis and the headline chip are caller-opt-in only, trading automatic salience for the no-uninvited-rhetoric contract.
